thankYouQuoteTitle: Thank You for Your Quote Request!
thankYouOrderText: Your order has been successfully placed and is being processed.
thankYouQuoteText: Your quote request has been successfully submitted. We will get back to you shortly.
paymentCanceledText: You canceled the payment, so your order has not been finalized.
paymentExpiredText: The payment expired before it was completed, so your order has not been finalized.
paymentNotCompletedText: Your payment was not completed, so your order has not been finalized.
itemsStillInCart: Your items are still in your cart — you can try the payment again.
paymentPendingText1: We haven't received confirmation of your payment yet. This can take a moment while your bank or payment provider processes it.
paymentPendingText2: Your order isn't finalized yet and your items are still in your cart. Check the status again in a moment, or come back later.
